heading: Applicable rules of Inter-American Commercial Arbitration Commission
label: 306 Applicable rules of Inter-American Commercial Arbitration Commission
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the entry into force of the Inter-American Convention on International Commercial Arbitration of , with respect to the United States (), see , set out as a note under .January 30, 1975Oct. 27, 1990section 3 of Pub. L. 101–369section 301 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: For the purposes of this chapter the rules of procedure of the Inter-American Commercial Arbitration Commission referred to in Article 3 of the Inter-American Convention shall, subject to subsection (b) of this section, be those rules as promulgated by the Commission on .July 1, 1988

children.label: b
children.text: In the event the rules of procedure of the Inter-American Commercial Arbitration Commission are modified or amended in accordance with the procedures for amendment of the rules of that Commission, the Secretary of State, by regulation in accordance with , consistent with the aims and purposes of this Convention, may prescribe that such modifications or amendments shall be effective for purposes of this chapter.section 553 of title 5
